description: A watercolor showing a large weathered bronze bell with green patina mounted on a dark iron frame or yoke, positioned in front of a white clapboard building with a red roof. The bell dominates the foreground, its heavy form contrasting with the simple domestic architecture behind it. The background fades into a pale, foggy sky. The painting has a clean, spare quality with minimal detail, focusing on the bell's substantial presence against the light building.
